details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Activate only if you've played at least 5 cards this turn. Whenever a Naterran Great Tree is put onto your field, recover 1 play point.
Storm. Whenever a Naterran Great Tree is put onto your field, recover 1 play point.

[fanfare] Put a Fairy Wisp token into your EX area. Give each Pixie token on your field [attack]+2. While this card is on your field, each Pixie token on your field has Storm and Assail. Whenever a Pixie token is put onto your field, give it [attack]+2.

When this card is discarded, put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area. When playing this card, bury 4 Natura cards: This card costs 4 less to play. ---------- [fanfare] Select a [forestcraft] follower that costs 5 or less in your cemetery and summon it.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. Ward. At the start of your end phase, give your leader [defense]+4 and, if a follower was put from your field into the cemetery this turn, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2.

Ward. On Evolve - Select a follower that costs 3 or less in your cemetery and summon it. At the start of your end phase, give your leader [defense]+4 and, if a follower was put from your field into the cemetery this turn, give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2.
Select a Ladica, the Stoneclaw on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Combo (5) - Deal damage equal to its attack to each enemy follower on the field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put a Naterran Great Tree or Fairy token into your EX area.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there are at least 3 cards in your EX area, deal 4 damage instead.
[fanfare] Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area. While this card is on your field, any Naterran Great Tree you play costs 1 less.
Select up to 2 Pixie followers on your field or in your EX area and give them [attack]+1. Combo (3) - Draw a card.

[fanfare] Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. If this card wasn't put onto the field from hand, deal 2 damage instead. [act] [engage], put this card on the bottom of its owner's deck: Select a Fable follower on your field or in your EX area and place 2 Fable counters on it.
[fanfare] Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area. [act] Banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field: Give your leader [defense]+3. Activate only once per turn.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area.
On Evolve - Select a Natura card in your cemetery and add it to your hand.
[fanfare] If there's another Fable card on your field, search your deck for a Fable follower, put it into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. You may place a Fable counter on that follower.
Put a Naterran Great Tree token into your EX area. Combo (3) - Put 2 instead and give your leader [defense]+2.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] You may put a Naterran Great Tree token onto your field or into your EX area.

Ward. On Evolve - Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may put up to 2 Natura cards from among them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] Banish 2 cards named Naterran Great Tree from your field: Select a Natura follower on your field and give it [attack]+2.

Storm. [fanfare] Select a Princess's Strike in your cemetery and play it for 0 play points. [act] [engage] 2 cards named Naterran Great Tree on your field: Give this follower [attack]+3. Give your leader [defense]+2.

[fanfare] If there are at least 5 [swordcraft] followers in your cemetery, select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. While there are at least 10 [swordcraft] followers in your cemetery, this follower has Storm.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. While this card is reserved on your field, it has Intimidate and Aura. At the start of your end phase, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

On Evolve - Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. While this card is reserved on your field, it has Intimidate and Aura. At the start of your end phase, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

When playing this card, [engage] 2 cards named Naterran Great Tree on your field: This card costs 2 less to play. This card costs 1 less to play if there's a Bayleon, Sovereign Light on your field. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Bane.
Bane. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there are at least 2 Assassin followers in your cemetery, destroy it instead.

[act] [cost01], [engage]: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to this follower's attack. [act] [cost03], [engage]: Select an enemy amulet on the field and banish it.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there's a Mistolina, Forest Princess on your field, deal 6 damage instead.
[fanfare] [engage] a Naterran Great Tree on your field: Give this follower Storm.

[fanfare] You may put a Naterran Great Tree token onto your field or into your EX area. [act] [engage] this card and any number of cards named Naterran Great Tree on your field: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of cards named Naterran Great Tree engaged this way.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
[lastwords] Put this card into its owner's EX area unevolved.
Put a Naterran Great Tree token onto your field and into your EX area.
When this card is discarded, select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field. Engage it and draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area.
While this card is on your field, any Machina card you play from the EX area costs 1 less. 4 times per turn, when you play a Machina card, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

Rush. [fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. From among them, you may summon any number of Machina followers that cost a total of 6 or less. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. At the start of your end phase, give each other Machina follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

[fanfare] Earth Rite: Choose one of the following. If this card was put onto the field from the cemetery, choose up to 3 instead. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage. (2) Give this follower [attack]+3. (3) Draw 2 cards. [act] [cost06]: Summon this card from your cemetery. Give it Storm and "[lastwords] Banish this card."
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Discard a spell: Draw a card.
On Evolve - Search your deck for a Splendid Conjury, put it into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. Spellchain (10) - It costs 2 less to play this turn.
When a Tetra, Sapphire Rebel is put onto your field, [cost01]: Put this card from your cemetery into your EX area. ---------- [quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may put a Machina card from among them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
Ward. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to 2 times the number of Machina cards in your EX area.
[fanfare] Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area. Once per turn, when you play a Machina card, draw a card.
Select up to 3 enemy followers on the field and deal 3 damage divided between them. If there's an Eleanor, Cosmic Flower on your field, deal 5 damage divided between them instead.

[fanfare] Put an Assembly Droid or Repair Mode token into your EX area. [act] [engage], banish a Machina card from your EX area: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of Machina cards in your EX area.

[fanfare] Choose one of the following. (1) Put an Assembly Droid token into your EX area. (2) If there are at least 3 Machina cards in your EX area, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Rush.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Choose one of the following. (1) Summon a Magic Sediment token. (2) Earth Rite: Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and deal 4 damage divided between them.
Select an enemy card on the field and put it on the bottom of its owner's deck. Its controller may summon a follower or amulet from their hand.

[fanfare] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Machina card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] [engage], bury this card: Deal 1 damage to each enemy leader. Activate only if there are at least 3 Machina cards in your EX area.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [evolve] [cost00]: Evolve this follower. Activate only if there are at least 10 Natura cards in your cemetery. [fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Natura card from among them and add it to your hand. Bury the rest.

On Evolve - Choose one of the following. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage, search your deck for a Shadow's Corrosion and put it into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. (2) Select a Shadow's Corrosion in your cemetery and play it for 0 play points.

Ward. [fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal up to 2 Marine followers not named Neptune, Tidemistress and add them to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. You may summon a Marine follower that costs 5 or less from your hand and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2.

When this card is discarded, [cost01]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. ---------- [act] Banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field: Deal 3 damage to each enemy follower on the field.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put a [dragoncraft] follower from among them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
On Evolve - Select another [dragoncraft] follower on your field or in your EX area and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

This card can't be played from the EX area. At the start of your end phase, if this card is in your EX area, deal 1 damage to each enemy leader for every 5 Natura cards in your cemetery. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage and, if there's a Valdain, Cursed Shadow on your field, put this card into its owner's EX area.
[fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+1 for every Marine follower on your field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field: Give this follower [attack]+2/[defense]+2. [lastwords] Summon a Naterran Great Tree token.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. [lastwords] Summon a Naterran Great Tree token.
[fanfare] Banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field: Increase your max play points by 1. [lastwords] Summon a Naterran Great Tree token.
Whenever a Dragonewt follower on your field attacks, deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.
[fanfare] Summon a Naterran Great Tree token. If Overflow is active for you, summon up to 2 instead and give this follower Rush.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
On Evolve - Select a [dragoncraft] follower that costs 3 or less in your cemetery and summon it.
[act] [cost02], bury this card: Deal 3 damage to each follower on the field and your leader.
Summon a Naterran Great Tree token. If Overflow is active for you, summon up to 3 instead.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Activate only if there are 5 Machina followers on your field. [act] Banish 2 Machina cards from your cemetery: Summon an Assembly Droid token. Activate only once per turn.
Storm. [act] [cost02], banish an Alpha Drive from your cemetery: Give each Machina follower on your field [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and Rush. Activate only once per turn.

[fanfare] Select up to 2 Vampire cards that cost a total of 6 or less in your cemetery and put them into your EX area. They cost 0 play points to play this turn. [act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of Vampire cards on your field.
[fanfare] Search your deck for a Machina follower that costs 3 or less, summon it, then shuffle your deck. [lastwords] Give your leader [defense]+2.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Bury the top card of your deck.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. Necrocharge (10) - Deal 4 damage instead.
Choose one of the following. (1) Select a Machina follower in your cemetery and add it to your hand. (2) Select a Mono, Garnet Rebel in your cemetery and summon it.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Bury the top 2 cards of your deck.
On Evolve - Select a Machina card that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn.
[fanfare] Discard a card: Put the top card of your deck into your EX area. If it's a follower, give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. If there's a Nicola, Forbidden Strength on your field, deal 6 damage instead.
Assail. Bane. While there's another Machina follower on your field, this follower has Rush.
[lastwords] Summon an Assembly Droid token.
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Deal 3 damage to your leader.
On Evolve - Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and destroy them.
Whenever a follower on your field evolves, summon 2 Ghost tokens. [act] [engage]: Select a Ghost on your field and give it Bane.

[fanfare] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Machina card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] [engage], bury this card: Put an Assembly Droid token into your EX area. Activate only if there are at least 5 Machina cards in your cemetery.
[evolve] [cost07]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Put a Repair Mode token into your EX area. [act] Banish a Repair Mode from your EX area: This card's [evolve] costs 1 less this turn.
On Evolve - Destroy each enemy follower on the field. [act] [cost00]: Select a Machina follower that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and summon it. Activate only once per turn.

Ward. When this card leaves the field, draw a card for every prayer counter on it. At the start of your end phase, select a card on your field. Place a prayer counter on it and give your leader [defense]+2.
Rush. [fanfare] Put 2 Repair Mode tokens into your EX area. Recover 2 play points. Strike - Draw a card. If there are 5 cards named Repair Mode in your EX area, draw 2 instead.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Each player puts a Repair Mode token into their EX area.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower that costs X or less on the field and destroy it. X equals the number of cards in your EX area.

Choose one of the following. (1) Banish 2 cards named Repair Mode from your EX area: Search your deck for a Machina follower that costs 3 or less, summon it, then shuffle your deck. (2) Banish 5 cards named Repair Mode from your EX area: Search your deck for a Machina follower that costs 6 or less, summon it, then shuffle your deck.

[fanfare] If this card wasn't put onto the field from hand, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. [act] [cost01], discard this card: Give your leader [defense]+1. Put this card into your deck 3rd from the top.
